text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're excited to have you on the team. Feel free to reach out if you need anything as you get started.
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You've been approved as an event_helper. Looking forward to seeing you at our events. Don't hesitate to ask if you have any questions!
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Your experience will be a great asset to our members. Welcome aboard!
